feature_name: Forced Tunneling for Virtual WAN Secure Hubs via NVA/SASE
notes: v2 gap: Virtual WAN Secure Hub now supports forced tunneling — routes internet-bound traffic from spoke VNets through a Network Virtual Appliance (NVA) or SASE solution deployed in a spoke VNet connected to Virtual WAN. Enables centralized internet traffic inspection (NS-7: centralized network security management) for all connected workloads. Conditional: requires Secure Hub deployment with Azure Firewall or NVA; routing configuration must explicitly set next-hop to NVA private IP for 0.0.0.0/0 route. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-wan/whats-new | Q2-D WebSearch June 2026 confirmed GA.
